basic_details.job_title: TNAU Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Project Assistant / Technical Assistant Posts
basic_details.short_information: Tamil Nadu Agricultural University (TNAU) Project Assistant / Technical Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Tamil Nadu Agricultural University. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the TNAU Project Assistant / Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: PG Degree in Arts and Science Domain, UG / PG Professional Course Degree or Equivalent in Agriculture / Engineering / Technology / Medical / Veterinary etc., Diploma in Agriculture / Horticulture or Any other Degree
qualification.details: Project Assistant: i) PG Degree in Arts and Science Domain. ii) UG / PG Professional Course Degree or Equivalent in Agriculture / Engineering / Technology / Medical / Veterinary etc. Technical Assistant: Diploma in Agriculture / Horticulture or Any other Degree

salary_details.details: Project Assistant: Rs. 25,000/- p.m. Technical Assistant: Rs. 16,000/- p.m.
